title: Planet Lingua - language learning that really pulls you in

description.title: Planet Lingua - language learning that really pulls you in
description.lead: Learn every day in short sessions that combine vocabulary, sentences, listening, and a dynamic bonus minigame. Planet Lingua is a modern web/PWA app that turns study routine into progress, flow, and fun.

tutorial.title: Why does it work?
tutorial.intro: Planet Lingua guides learners from first launch to daily progress with a clear loop that is easy to keep going.
benefits: Clear learning path: vocabulary -> sentences -> listening -> numbers -> bonus.
Daily rhythm: quick sessions that are realistic to maintain.
Interactive bonus game: letters, bosses, power-ups, and real language repetition.
Motivation and streaks: badges plus faster bonus unlocks.
Hall of Fame: Top 10 leaderboard and score comparison between users.
Web + PWA: works in the browser and as an installable app.

showcase.title: What does the user get?
showcase.intro: From the first session, the learner gets a simple structure, visible progress, and playful motivation.
showcase.caption: Planet Lingua product overview
items: Step-by-step onboarding.
A personalized rocket and nickname.
Audio feedback and TTS for letters or words.
Daily and long-term progress.
Learning through action instead of boredom.

onboarding.title: Quick start (first 2 minutes)
onboarding.intro: Planet Lingua is a web/PWA app for daily language learning through short, engaging sessions.
onboarding.summary: You learn through vocabulary, sentences, listening, numbers, and a bonus minigame. The first run is reduced to just a few simple steps.
onboarding.caption: Onboarding and language selection
items: Create an account (email + password) and activate it from the email link.
Choose your language pair (source -> target) on the planet screen.
Tap START and begin the daily session.
After account creation you hear the "access granted" sound.

how.title: What does a learning session look like?
how.intro: Each session has 5 stages and moves the learner from fundamentals to the bonus minigame.
how.caption: Daily learning session
items: Vocabulary: flashcards, listening, letter building, progress, and review.
Sentences: practical sentence work, exercises, and answer verification.
Listening: material recap, translation, sentence-by-sentence explanation, and a cleaner format without duplicates or language mixing.
Numbers: a quick daily review of numbers and pronunciation.
Bonus (minigame): collect letters, build words, fight bosses, and earn rewards.

progress.title: Key bonus features
progress.intro: The bonus game is not separate from learning - it reinforces vocabulary and keeps momentum high.
progress.caption: Bonus game and power-ups
items: Easy/Hard mode: Easy gives 5 lives, Hard gives 3 lives.
Boss timer pause: the word timer starts only after the boss is defeated.
Correct-letter reading can be enabled with a checkbox and is on by default.
After completing a full word, the app reads the word and its translation.
Bosses evolve with level, and drops can be positive or negative, such as +1 life, slow, turbo, or hazard.

bonuses.title: Hall of Fame (Top 10)
bonuses.intro: Bonus results are saved and compared between users, so the minigame also supports healthy competition.
bonuses.caption: Leaderboard and bonus scores
items: Bonus scores are saved on the server.
Results are compared across user accounts.
The leaderboard shows avatar, name, and score in full screen.
Only a score that beats the current threshold enters the Top 10.
Your leaderboard nickname is set in the rocket editor - use a default name or your own.

customization.title: Rocket and personalization
customization.intro: Planet Lingua combines learning with light identity and customization layers.
customization.caption: Rocket and profile personalization
items: The rocket editor includes variants and style options.
Your nickname can be personalized for the ranking.
The astronaut HUD shows a life ring and reaction animations.
Audio and UI are tuned for events like start, boss fights, collection, and explosions.

learningPanels.title: Learning panels
learningPanels.intro: These new screens show how the 30-minute flow works across the main learning modules.

items.overview: 30-minute session overview with active learning modules.
items.sentences: Sentence exercise panel with fill-in practice and answer validation.
items.listening: Listening panel with recap, translation, and sentence-by-sentence explanation.
items.numbers: Numbers panel for fast daily pronunciation review.

profile.title: User profile
profile.intro: The profile gathers progress, active language pairs, achievements, and personalization settings.

items.overview: Learning profile with active pairs, bonus game, and achievements.
items.rocket: Rocket editor with Hall of Fame nickname settings.

premium.title: Premium (short version)
premium.intro: Premium unlocks broader customization and bonus options.
premium.caption: Premium features
items: More bonus music options.
Faster access to higher gameplay and customization layers.

webPwa.title: Web and PWA mode
webPwa.intro: Planet Lingua works consistently on desktop and mobile, without requiring a traditional app-store install.
webPwa.caption: Planet Lingua on Web and PWA
items: You can use the app as a Web app in the browser.
You can also install it as a PWA.
Both modes are functionally aligned, while PWA adds app-like convenience and cache.

items.a: It is a daily language-learning app (Web + PWA) that combines classic exercises with a bonus minigame and a progress system.
Create an account, activate it from the email link, choose your language pair (source -> target), and tap START.

items.q: What does a session look like?
items: Vocabulary
Sentences
Listening
Numbers
Bonus game

items.q: Does Planet Lingua work on mobile?
items.a: Yes. You can use it in the browser or install it as a PWA.
It is a vocabulary reinforcement minigame where you collect letters, build words, fight bosses, and gather power-ups.

items.q: How do lives and difficulty levels work?
items: Easy: 5 lives
Hard: 3 lives

items.a: It is the Top 10 ranking for bonus scores. Results are stored on the server and compared between users.

items.q: When does a score enter the Hall of Fame?
items.a: When it beats the current Top 10 threshold.

items.q: Can I change my ranking name?
items.a: Yes - you set your nickname in the rocket editor. You can use a default name or your own.

items.q: Does the bonus read letters and words aloud?
items.a: Yes. You can enable reading for correctly hit letters, and after completing a whole word the app reads the word and its translation.

items.q: How do streak and badges work?
items.a: Regular learning builds your streak. After 3 consecutive days you unlock a badge and get faster access to the next bonus elements.
Premium unlocks extended customization and bonus options, such as full bonus music selection and broader gameplay options.

data.title: Data and account
data.p1: Planet Lingua stores only the data required for account handling, learning progress, streaks, leaderboard, and bonuses.
data.p2: You can request account and data deletion at any time.

keywords: planet lingua, language learning, web pwa, onboarding, bonus game, hall of fame, streak, premium, rocket customization

hero.title: Planet Lingua
hero.subtitle: Learn languages daily and discover new planets
